scripts.lint:go: cd src/api && (golangci-lint run 2>/dev/null || ~/go/bin/golangci-lint run || echo 'golangci-lint not found. Install with: go install github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/cmd/golangci-lint@latest')
scripts.lint:go:fix: cd src/api && (golangci-lint run --fix 2>/dev/null || ~/go/bin/golangci-lint run --fix || echo 'golangci-lint not found. Install with: go install github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/cmd/golangci-lint@latest')
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint:check && npm run lint:go
scripts.test:all: npm run test:run && npm run test:go
scripts.check: npm run lint:all && npm run format:check && npm run test:all
scripts.fix: npm run format && npm run lint --fix && npm run lint:go:fix
